summary: sync seeds one synthetic fixture row per resource when PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1 and the backend returns no data.
reason: Mock-mode verify has no GraphQL backend, so the data-pipeline gate could not populate the store. The fixture lets verify pass without a token; live runs use real data and never hit this path.
validated_outcome: Mock verify data_pipeline PASS (resources has 5 rows); live verify PASS (427 rows).
